content_preview:
Trial Corner PRD
Objective: Reduce Day 0 Trial Cancellations by solving Mandate Fear. We will replace the
user's "defensive strike" (canceling to avoid charges) with a "Safe Zone" that guarantees
control.
1. The Problem: "The Defensive Strike"
The Data: 42% of users cancel trials within 24 hours, 25% of these cancel before watching
any content between 5 mins to 2 hours.
The Psyche: Users pay ₹ 1 and cancel immediately as a defensive measure to avoid "hidden"
auto-pay charges. They feel like prey
